Function.Inference: A short upbeat intro ending with a |: repeat sign.
The main loop body starting after |: and ending with :| at bar 34.

Section.Inference: Pickup measure serving as an intro.
First theme featuring sustained melody notes with brief syncopated responses.
Contrasting theme characterized by rapid sixteenth-note alternations and staccato-like articulation.
Direct restatement of the first theme.
New section characterized by a continuous stream of eighth-note dyads before looping back.
